metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "operator":
              return f"The {subj} was operated by {obj}"
with:
  if p == "operator":
              # Prefer active voice when NASA is the operator
              if obj.strip().lower() == "nasa":
                  return f"NASA operated {subj}"
              return f"The {subj} is operated by {obj}"
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "award":
              return f"{subj} received the {obj}"
with:
  if p == "award":
              return f"{subj} received the {obj}"
Change 3: Replace:
  if p == "ribbonaward":
              return f"{subj} was awarded the {obj}"
with:
  if p == "ribbonaward":
              return f"{subj} was awarded the {obj}"
Change 4: Replace:
  if p == "operator":
              return f"The {subj} was operated by {obj}"
with:
  if p == "operator":
              # Prefer active voice when NASA is the operator
              if obj.strip().lower() == "nasa":
                  return f"NASA operated {subj}"
              return f"The {subj} is operated by {obj}"
Change 5: Replace:
  if p == "crewMembers":
              return f"{obj} was a crew member of {subj}"
with:
  if p == "crewMembers":
              return f"{obj} was a crew member of {subj}"
